entity: Wilt Chamberlain 1961-62 season (PHW, Regular): 80 GP, 50.4 PPG, 25.7 RPG, 2.4 APG — the highest single-season scoring average in NBA history, the season that included Wilt's 100-point game on 1962-03-02

query_target.sql: SELECT season_year, season_type, CAST(gp AS INTEGER) AS gp, avg_pts, avg_reb, avg_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 76375 AND season_year = '1961-62' AND season_type = 'Regular' LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player; match:containsObject with exact values. agg_player_season.total_pts is unreliable for historical players (inflated by a factor of ~3x for Wilt), so the fixture pins avg_pts (which checks out at 50.4 PPG, matching BBR). team_abbreviation shows 'PHI' for this season (dim_team format) rather than 'PHW'; the fixture omits it to avoid the unreliable column.
